name: Audit Partition Maintenance
description: Creates future monthly partitions for audit.chat_query_logs. Runs on 1st of each month.

parameters.query:
-- Get current date info
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())::int as current_year,
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())::int as current_month,
  TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM') as current_period;
